exceptions.rationale: Temporary Starlette advisory exception while prometheus-fastapi-instrumentator 7.1.0 constrains the FastAPI runtime stack below the audited Starlette fixed line.
exceptions.removal_condition: Remove when the instrumentation dependency supports a FastAPI/Starlette runtime with this advisory fixed.
compensating_controls: archive routes require caller context and authorization
request logging avoids raw document identifiers
CI continues to run pip-audit with explicit governed ignores
